category_sources: Official zssh homepage describes zssh as interactively transferring files while using ssh.
source_facts.description: Interactive file transfers over SSH.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project use zssh.
docs_sources: Official FAQ is linked from the zssh homepage.
Official homepage includes description, options, builtins, requirements, tips, and links to the FAQ.
repo_sources: Official zssh homepage links to the SourceForge project summary for zssh.
SourceForge project page is the official project hosting page; no separate active source-control browser was found.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes zmodem transfers via rz and sz while using an ssh session.
source_facts.description identifies interactive file transfers over SSH.
